mnemonics: CHAT: Core tasks (Chatbots), Handling (Sentiment Analysis), Advanced models (Transformers), Techniques (NER)
keyPoints: Key architectures include RNNs, LSTMs, and Transformer models.
Core tasks are classification, generation, translation, and sentiment analysis.
Evaluation metrics like BLEU score and perplexity are crucial for model assessment.
commonMistakes: Confusing syntactic parsing with semantic analysis.
Overlooking the importance of data preprocessing and cleaning.
Assuming a larger model always yields better performance without considering overfitting.
